column1: OECD and AIAS, Institutional Characteristics of Trade Unions, Wage Setting, State Intervention and Social Pacts (ICTWSS) database

Core indicators
Version 2.0 provides new and up-to-date information on employer organisations, trade union membership and collective bargaining coverage. An update of the other sections of the database will be made available at the end of 2026.
